TARBUTTITESITE
LOCATION
The site is located at Kopje No. 2 at latitude 14027’44"S and longitude
28026’26"E, respectively, within Kabwe’s mining area a few kilometres from
theCentralBusinessDistrictandfewmetresnorthandeastoftheGreatNorth
Road in the Central Province of Zambia within the vicinity of the discovery
sitefortheBrokenHillMan. Itisneartheintersectionoftherailwaylineand
the road from Mulungushi Dam to the mine administration area and also to
town.
